# Now Roaming

Now Roaming is a travel blog about long-term travel, first days in new cities, food, reflection, money, packing, and the quiet work of becoming clear.

Tagline: It's good to be lost.
Author: Joseph Huckabee
Canonical site: https://youarenowroaming.com

## Main Sections

- Home: https://youarenowroaming.com/
- Journal: https://youarenowroaming.com/#journal
- Routes: https://youarenowroaming.com/#routes
- Field Notes: https://youarenowroaming.com/#notes

## Geo-tagged Route Photos


- Beijing, China (39.9042 N, 116.4074 E)
  - Date: 2026-07-16
  - Category: Arrivals
  - Caption: First morning after the long flight. Heat, humidity, and the strange calm of actually doing the thing.
  - Post: https://youarenowroaming.com/posts/stop1_beijing/

- Chongqing, China (29.5630 N, 106.5516 E)
  - Date: 2026-07-20
  - Category: Arrivals
  - Caption: City lights stacked into the hills. A place I had been imagining finally became physical.
  - Post: https://youarenowroaming.com/posts/stop2_chongching/

- Seoul, South Korea (37.5665 N, 126.9780 E)
  - Date: 2026-08-02
  - Category: Thoughts
  - Caption: A reset day. Coffee, transit, distance from home, and the first honest notes about what this trip is for.
  - Post: https://youarenowroaming.com/posts/stop3_seoul/

- Tokyo, Japan (35.6762 N, 139.6503 E)
  - Date: 2026-08-12
  - Category: Packing / Buying / Spending
  - Caption: What earns space in the bag, what drains the budget, and what is actually worth carrying.
  - Post: https://youarenowroaming.com/posts/stop4_tokyo/


## Field Notes


- 01. Travel light, pay attention: The best gear disappears. The best memories get sharper when there is space to receive them.

- 02. Eat where the smoke is: A line outside a tiny stall is usually better guidance than a hundred polished recommendations.

- 03. Leave room for silence: Not every view needs a caption. Some places do their work after the camera goes down.


## Content Notes

This site is a first-person travel journal about long-term travel, city arrivals, food, enlightenment, thoughts, packing, buying, spending, and personal transformation.
